name: 3n + 1 Problem
description: The Collatz Conjecture, also known as 3n + 1, is a mathematical problem that has puzzled mathematicians for years.  The conjecture states that if you take any positive integer n, and if n is even, divide it by 2, and if n is odd, multiply it by 3 and add 1, and repeat this process, you will eventually reach the number 1.  This benchmark tests the performance of the 3n + 1 problem on the number "837,799" which takes 524 steps to reach 1.
